text.title: RAG Corpus Discovery Interview Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from SME roster to validated corpus-discovery-report.

step.name: roster-and-consent
step.action: Scope ≥5 SMEs; collect signed consent forms.
step.output: scheduled interview list with consent links
step.decision-gate: ≥5 SMEs with signed consent else block

step.name: draft-guide
step.action: Write 5–9 past-behaviour anchored prompts. Strip leading phrasing.

step.name: conduct-and-record
step.action: Run each interview; produce recording_url + transcript_id.

step.name: extract-quotes
step.action: Extract ≥5 verbatim quotes attributed to transcript_id + timestamp.

step.name: synthesise-and-commit
step.action: Label each finding `hypothesis` (single-interview) or `finding` (multi-interview). Run validator; commit.
